title: Ortholotus rectus
properties: Ortholotus rectus is not a widely recognized plant species. However, I can provide information on a plant with a similar name. Ortholotus is actually an outdated name for the genus Eremophila, commonly known as emu bush. Eremophila species, including Eremophila recta, have been reported to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Further research may be needed to confirm the therapeutic properties of these plants in detail.
